Metadata.title: Angelove — Premium Children's Furniture
Metadata.description: European family label. Safe, comfortable and versatile children's furniture made with OEKO-TEX certified materials.

Hero.title: Premium Children's Furniture
Hero.subtitle: As parents, we know how important safe, comfortable and versatile products are for your children. Every Angelove product is OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified.

Products.title: Our Collection
Products.subtitle: Modular foam furniture that grows with your child

sofas.name: Play Sofa
sofas.description: Full-size modular play sofa with 7-in-1 configurations and sleep function. Premium corduroy upholstery.

halfSofas.name: Children's Armchair 3-in-1
halfSofas.description: Compact foldable armchair that transforms into a couch and play mat. Lightweight and child-friendly.

waveLounger.name: Wave Lounger
waveLounger.description: Wave-shaped lounger for reading and relaxation. Ergonomic single-piece design, perfect for quiet time.

sofaPremium.name: Premium Sofa
sofaPremium.description: Premium corduroy sofa with enhanced foam density and wider configuration options for maximum comfort.
sofaPremium.features: Premium corduroy, Enhanced foam, Wide configurations

huepfpolster.name: Bouncing Cushion
huepfpolster.description: Indoor bouncing cushion with Bonnell spring system. OEKO-TEX certified premium corduroy cover in 6 colours.

About.title: About Angelove
About.subtitle: A European Family Label
About.story: Angelove is a European family label born from our own parenting experience. As parents, we know how important safe, comfortable and versatile products are for children.
About.storyExtended: We created a collection of sofas, armchairs and modular foam elements that combine play, rest and creativity. Every product is made with OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified materials — the highest safety standard for textiles in contact with baby skin.

safety.title: Safety First
safety.description: All products are OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified — the highest textile safety standard. Hypoallergenic foam core and tested materials.

montessori.title: Montessori Inspired
montessori.description: Low-height furniture that encourages children's independence. Lightweight enough for children to rearrange themselves.

european.title: European Quality
european.description: Designed and manufactured in Europe. Premium corduroy upholstery and high-density foam for lasting comfort.

versatile.title: Versatile Design
versatile.description: Multi-functional furniture — from 3-in-1 armchairs to 7-in-1 modular sofas. Grows with your child.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.subtitle: Have a question? We'd love to hear from you.
Contact.name: Your Name
Contact.successMessage: Thank you! We'll get back to you soon.

Footer.tagline: Premium children's furniture. Made with love in Europe.
